Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First let me understand the raw events 1 The user starts by focusing on Quarterly Report docx briefly 2 Then switches to Document1 docx and types content saves it 3 Switches to email reads email about Annual Meeting replies sends 4 Switches to PDF Report Draft pdf scrolls highlights text 5 Switches to Excel Budget 2024 xlsx types saves 6 Switches back to Document1 docx adds reference saves closes 7 Switches to Quarterly Report docx types saves closes

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The most natural case identification is by document artifact being worked on Case 1 Document1 docx Word document Case 2 Quarterly Report docx Word document Case 3 Email Annual Meeting email task Case 4 Report Draft pdf PDF review Case 5 Budget 2024 xlsx Excel spreadsheet

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait let me reconsider The initial FOCUS on Quarterly Report docx at 08 59 50 might just be a brief switch without actual work Let me think about this more carefully

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Actually looking again at the data 08 59 50 FOCUS on Quarterly Report docx no further activity on this until later 09 00 00 FOCUS on Document1 docx 09 00 30 09 01 15 Work on Document1 docx type save 09 01 45 SWITCH to Email 09 02 00 09 03 20 Email work read reply send 09 04 00 SWITCH to Report Draft pdf 09 04 30 09 04 45 PDF work scroll highlight 09 05 00 FOCUS on Budget 2024 xlsx 09 05 15 09 05 45 Excel work type save 09 06 00 SWITCH back to Document1 docx 09 06 15 09 07 00 More work on Document1 docx then close 09 07 15 FOCUS on Quarterly Report docx 09 07 45 09 08 15 Work on Quarterly Report docx then close

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: So the cases are 1 Document1 docx 09 00 00 to 09 01 15 then 09 06 00 to 09 07 00 2 Email about Annual Meeting 09 01 45 to 09 03 20 3 Report Draft pdf 09 04 00 to 09 04 45 4 Budget 2024 xlsx 09 05 00 to 09 05 45 5 Quarterly Report docx 08 59 50 brief focus then 09 07 15 to 09 08 15

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The 08 59 50 FOCUS on Quarterly Report docx is interesting it could be a brief check without actual work or the start of a session that was interrupted Ill include it as a case start but it might be debatable

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Now let me name the activities Ill use higher level standardized names For Document1 docx Start Editing Document Draft Content Add Reference Save Document Close Document For Email Read Email Compose Reply Send Email For Report Draft pdf Open PDF Review Content scroll plus highlight Highlight Key Information For Budget 2024 xlsx Start Editing Spreadsheet Update Q1 Figures Insert Q2 Row Save Spreadsheet For Quarterly Report docx Open Document Draft Executive Summary Save Document Close Document

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Wait I should also think about whether to keep the SWITCH events They could be useful for showing transitions but they do not really represent activities within a case Actually in process mining transitions are usually implied by the order of events within a case so I might not need explicit switch events

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Approach 1 Each artifact document email spreadsheet is a case Approach 2 Each contiguous work session on an artifact is a case Approach 1 is more typical for process mining because it allows you to see the full lifecycle of work on a single artifact including interruptions and resumption Ill go with Approach 1

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Actually I want to be more specific with the typing Let me use more descriptive activity names that capture what the user is doing

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Hmm Continue Drafting is a bit weak Let me think of a cleaner approach

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Actually in process mining having multiple events with similar names within a case is common So Ill keep them separate but with clearer names

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Let me also think about additional attributes that could be useful Application Window Document name Any specific keys values

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Actually looking at this more carefully I think I should standardize the activity names more

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Let me use a consistent vocabulary For document work Word Open Document Compose Content for typing Save Document Close Document For email Read Email Compose Reply Send Reply For PDF Open PDF Review Content scroll Highlight Content For Excel Open Spreadsheet Edit Content or specific like Update Figures Insert Row Save Spreadsheet

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Actually I think there is value in keeping the activity names somewhat specific to the action Let me use a balanced approach where activities are meaningful but consistent

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - PE
Text: I could include 08 59 50 as the start of the Quarterly Report case which then has a long interruption and resumed at 09 07 15 or ignore 08 59 50 as a brief abandoned focus I think including it is more accurate to the data

Name: Validation - PE
Text: I think Option A is most accurate The user did open the document then came back to it later

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For the email case the log shows 09 01 45 SWITCH to Email Inbox 09 02 00 CLICK Open Email about Annual Meeting 09 02 30 SCROLL Down 09 02 45 CLICK Reply to Email 09 03 00 TYPING Meeting details confirmed 09 03 20 CLICK Send Email
